---
title: Mon frère
author: Raphaële Slimane
image: https://res.cloudinary.com/dyjfju0u4/image/upload/f_auto,q_auto/v1784557521/monfrere_20211228_ejhogz.png
description: Mon frère
categories: ["generalillustration"]
date: 2021-12-28
format:
  html:
    page-layout: full
---

![](https://res.cloudinary.com/dyjfju0u4/image/upload/f_auto,q_auto/v1784557521/monfrere_20211228_ejhogz.png)
